news.title:
Global Health Ltd to hold a virtual one-on-one investor/analyst meeting on March 31, 2026.
Meeting organized with Permodalan Nasional Berhad; no unpublished price-sensitive information to be shared.
news.summary:

news.title:
Global Health gained 3.8% to close at Rs 1011.4 after announcing a 400-bed hospital in Varanasi, investing Rs 550 crore.
Despite Q3 profit falling 33.5% to Rs 95.02 crore, analysts retained a 'buy' rating citing growth prospects and improving margins.
news.summary:
Global Health gained 3.8% to close at Rs 1011.4 after announcing a 400-bed hospital in Varanasi, investing Rs 550 crore.
Despite Q3 profit falling 33.5% to Rs 95.02 crore, analysts retained a 'buy' rating citing growth prospects and improving margins.

news.title:
Global Health Ltd to invest Rs. 550 cr for a 400-bed hospital in Varanasi.
Facility under lease with Shrypal Hospitality, boosting Eastern UP healthcare capacity.
news.summary:
Global Health Ltd to invest Rs. 550 cr for a 400-bed hospital in Varanasi.
Facility under lease with Shrypal Hospitality, boosting Eastern UP healthcare capacity.

news.title:
Global Health Ltd opened 4.07% higher on 24 Mar 2026 after prior declines.
The surge signals a potential market dynamics shift in the hospital sector.
news.summary:
Global Health Ltd opened 4.07% higher on 24 Mar 2026 after prior declines.
The surge signals a potential market dynamics shift in the hospital sector.

news.title:
Global Health Ltd to meet investors/analysts on Feb 27, 2026, in Gurugram.
Meeting organized with BofA Securities; no UPSI will be shared.
news.summary:

news.title:
Global Health Ltd reported Q3 FY26 revenue growth of 19.1% YoY to INR 11,428M; EBITDA ex-Noida rose 10.9% YoY with margins at 25.4%.
Medanta Noida faced EBITDA loss of INR 320M; PAT dropped 33.5% YoY to INR 950M due to depreciation, finance costs, and exceptional items.
news.summary:
Global Health Ltd reported Q3 FY26 revenue growth of 19.1% YoY to INR 11,428M; EBITDA ex-Noida rose 10.9% YoY with margins at 25.4%.
Medanta Noida faced EBITDA loss of INR 320M; PAT dropped 33.5% YoY to INR 950M due to depreciation, finance costs, and exceptional items.

news.title:
Global Health Ltd approved unaudited Q3 and 9-month results for Dec 2025.
New head for Diagnostic Services appointed; reappointments and a new director recommended.
news.summary:
Global Health Ltd approved unaudited Q3 and 9-month results for Dec 2025.
New head for Diagnostic Services appointed; reappointments and a new director recommended.

news.title:
Global Health's Q3 revenue rose to 11.2B rupees from 9.43B YoY.
This reflects strong year-over-year growth for the company.
news.summary:
Global Health's Q3 revenue rose to 11.2B rupees from 9.43B YoY.
This reflects strong year-over-year growth for the company.

news.title:
Global Health's Q3 profit before exceptional items fell to 1.56B from 1.89B YoY.
The company recorded an exceptional item of 366M during the quarter.
news.summary:
Global Health's Q3 profit before exceptional items fell to 1.56B from 1.89B YoY.
The company recorded an exceptional item of 366M during the quarter.

news.title:
Global Health Ltd to hold a Board Meeting on Feb 4, 2026, to review Q3 and nine-month financial results.
Trading window remains closed until 48 hours post-declaration of results, adhering to SEBI regulations.

news.title:
Crisil upgraded Global Health Ltd's long-term rating to AA Stable from AA Positive.
Short-term rating reaffirmed at A1; continuous surveillance and review maintained.
news.summary:

news.title:
Adani Enterprises acquires 72.8% stake in FSTC for ₹820 crore; TCS announces 5-year SAP Cloud-AI deal.
Bandhan Bank to sell ₹6,900 crore NPAs; Global Health opens 550-bed Medanta hospital in Noida.
news.summary:
Adani Enterprises acquires 72.8% stake in FSTC for ₹820 crore; TCS announces 5-year SAP Cloud-AI deal.
Bandhan Bank to sell ₹6,900 crore NPAs; Global Health opens 550-bed Medanta hospital in Noida.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal expects 17% upside in Global Health due to strong operational momentum and expansion plans.
Medanta Noida's 226-bed facility strategically serves high-demand areas, boosting long-term growth for Global Health.
news.summary:
